gate_results.status_reason: The synthetic packet is frozen and its receiver assessment pins the same packet identity.

receiver_judgment.statement: The referenced synthetic inputs meet the provenance control for this fixture.
receiver_judgment.verification: Reference evaluator identity and pointer checks.

falsifiers: A packet, revision, digest, or assessment reference fails to match.
nonclaims: This provenance pass does not show that any physical claim is true.

gate_results.status_reason: The selected source-native construction and retained alternative are explicit.

receiver_judgment.statement: The fixture makes its construction fork and shared construction premise visible.

falsifiers: The selected branch or a material alternative is missing from the frozen packet.
nonclaims: The pass does not show transfer to the standard-field alternative.

gate_results.status_reason: One declared joint artifact and one receiver argument identify the synthetic joint object.

receiver_judgment.statement: The synthetic methods are assessed as one object without rewriting their source results.

falsifiers: The methods cannot be interpreted over the same declared object without changing source meaning.
nonclaims: Formation does not imply evidential independence among methods.

gate_results.status_reason: For this positive control, the named residual remains after the fixture's declared alternatives.

receiver_judgment.statement: The synthetic residual survives only the explicitly delimited completion/null control.
receiver_judgment.verification: Controlled fixture assertion; no physical completion theorem.

falsifiers: An admissible declared completion absorbs the residual or places it in the null class.
nonclaims: The fixture does not exhaust all mathematically or physically admissible completions.

gate_results.status_reason: The positive control stipulates a receiver-visible operational distinction between its two branches.

receiver_judgment.statement: Within this synthetic control only, the residual is classified as capability-relevant rather than a label difference.

falsifiers: Both branches have the same operational possibility set under the declared test.
nonclaims: This synthetic classification is not evidence of a real capability change.

gate_results.status_reason: The packet leaves the selector unresolved and identifies a distinct synthetic boundary owner.

receiver_judgment.statement: The synthetic selector is external to the delimited source model and its requested owner is named.

falsifiers: The selector is derived within the declared source model or no accountable boundary owner is identified.
nonclaims: This does not show that the named boundary supplies or uniquely fixes the selector.

gate_results.status_reason: All six substantive gates use exactly the declared argument, chain, and construction branch.

receiver_judgment.statement: The synthetic positive control uses one explicit receiver argument across the entire substantive chain.

falsifiers: Any substantive gate changes argument chain, construction branch, or argument reference.
nonclaims: A single identifier does not prove that the referenced argument is scientifically sound.

gate_results.status_reason: An exact reversal of the two synthetic branch labels leaves the declared verdict unchanged.

receiver_judgment.statement: The fixture verdict is invariant under its named branch-label reversal.

falsifiers: The verdict changes after an exact reversal of the branch labels.
nonclaims: One label reversal does not prove invariance under every admissible reformulation.

assumptions: Frozen-Packet v0.2 and its separate receiving assessment have already passed their own contracts.
The synthetic receiver judgments are controls, not claims about nature.
nonclaims: This gate run does not establish any physics.
Structural success does not promote the source claim or receiver judgments.
The synthetic positive case does not make the hierarchy universal.
reopening_conditions: A real case requires a non-cumulative prerequisite graph.
A justified multi-chain proof cannot be represented without appearing artificially assembled.
A scientifically necessary outcome is not representable by PASS, FAIL, BLOCKED, or INDETERMINATE.
